title: Elite X Quality Guns (TACZ)
description: Tac Z addon mod that Adds weapons from Elite X Warfare but enhanced
body:
# The Most Quality Guns experience now on Tac Z as a mod  

Elite X Quality Guns is an mod adds weapons from Elite X Warfare but remade and enhanced
Basically a gun pack for Tac Z mod (Forge 1.18.2 - 1.20.1)
And fabric (1.20.1)

### Support me on Pateron if you appreciate my work 


## HOW TO INSTALL:
Ans: Simply put this to your mods folder along with Tac z and other mods. Make sure you have tac z mod installed , without it , it will never work


# New Update 

## We are have officially  started the development of Final update 6.0



## F.A.Q
Q1: Is it Available for Forge and Fabric?
Ans : Yes and soon i will make universal version 

Q2: Can i use it in my modpack?
Ans : Yes you have my permission to use my Mod into your modpack i would be very happy.
